title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.025 - Officers, how selected
text:
260.025.  Officers, how selected. — The authority shall elect one of its members as chairman and another as vice chairman and shall appoint a secretary and a treasurer, which offices may be combined, and who need not be members of the authority.
(L. 1972 H.B. 1041 § 5) 
Effective 1-22-73
